title: AgentIdentity
description: Canonical identity artifact for every agent participating in a multi-agent ALAGF session. Net-new in v2. Architectural foundation for the multi-agent extension. Its registration must precede all other session events (Invariant 4). The max_synthesis_depth field structurally enforces Invariant 2 (Non-Bypass) by making further AI progression architecturally impossible once the ceiling is reached.
$comment: Net-new v2 artifact. No v1 precursor. Governance rationale: every agent boundary is a governance boundary; cross-boundary outputs require portable identity provenance for Invariants 1, 3, and 4.

authority_level.description: AgentIdentity is a registration artifact. It does not itself produce binding outcomes. Agents registered by it produce non-binding outputs exclusively.

agent_id.description: Unique, session-scoped agent identifier. Required before any agent-sourced Observation or Hypothesis may be accepted.

agent_type.description: Role classification. Drives permitted authority_scope values and ordering constraints in the ledger.

model_id.description: Declared model version (e.g., claude-sonnet-4-6). Required for reconstructability (Invariant 4).

provider.description: Model provider identifier (e.g., anthropic, openai, internal).

registration_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of registration. Must precede any output from this agent.

trust_tier.description: BME-CI tier classification. T1 Monitor, T2 Review, T3 Escalate, T4 Freeze. Set at registration based on prior session performance or explicit human assignment.

authority_scope.description: Operational scope permitted for this agent. Observations_only is the most restrictive. No scope permits binding output (Invariant 1).

non_authoritative_flag.description: Hard-coded true. Non-overridable. Every agent's outputs are non-binding regardless of trust_tier or authority_scope. Enforces Invariant 1 at the schema level.

registered_by.description: Identifier of the human auditor who performed the registration. Must resolve to a human identity. Enforces human-authority provenance on the registry itself.

parent_agent_id.description: Reference to the registering parent agent. Null for ORCHESTRATOR agents. Required non-null for SUB_AGENT and VALIDATOR types.

max_synthesis_depth.description: Governance ceiling on inferential hops from human-sourced Observation. Structurally enforced: when the ceiling is reached, DEPTH_LIMIT_REACHED is emitted and the system cannot continue without human intervention. Primary enforcement mechanism for Invariant 2 (Non-Bypass).

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the agent. Status transitions emit AGENT_SUSPENDED or AGENT_REVOKED ledger events.

revocation_event_ref.description: Reference to the ledger event that revoked this agent. Null while status is ACTIVE or SUSPENDED.
